boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy requires exact match of batch, assay, criterion, and date in closure before release.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-79 only; BATCH-XOR-078 is X-78.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CLOSE-XOR-078 matches X-79 not X-78; DEV-XOR-078 alert remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: No exact closure for batch X-78 on 2026-06-28.

final_answer: ESCALATE. CLOSE-XOR-078 applies only to batch X-79. BATCH-XOR-078 (X-78) has visible DEV-XOR-078 alert with no matching closure. Policy STD-XOR-078-P blocks release until exact boundary match on batch, assay AX-22, Cq<=31, and date.
